facebook.caption: POV: you follow the smell of grilled seafood down Đường Trần Hưng Đạo after dark. That's how you find Chợ đêm Phú Quốc. Stall after stall of fresh squid, grilled corn, local snacks. 4.2 stars from 342 real visitors. Go hungry. Go early before the crowds. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch what happens when you walk Đường Trần Hưng Đạo at night. Smoke, lights, grilled everything. Chợ đêm Phú Quốc hits different after sunset. 4.2 stars, 342 reviews. Don't eat dinner before this.
